title: Day 6 - Hiragana Practice
html:
Please download today's hiragana practice here: Hiragana Practice Day 6.pdf

Practising writing hiragana every day is a very important exercise to help you learn quickly. If you have any questions you can always ask other students and teachers in the group here.

To learn and practice stroke you can watch these free YouTube tutorial:

が, ぎ, ぐ, げ, ご: https://youtu.be/x9DFpyUEFlg

ざ, じ, ず, ぜ, ぞ: https://youtu.be/bcDNDXymbiE

だ, ぢ, づ, で, ど: https://youtu.be/yrONOhESI-U

ば, び, ぶ, べ, ぼ: https://youtu.be/o2K7K5UTgv4

ぱ, ぴ, ぷ, ぺ, ぽ: https://youtu.be/ONuktLj_Ubw
